summary: Frontend testing of modernized NotaryChain dashboard with new bento grid layout and dropdown menu. All features verified: bento grid sections (Core Actions, AI Intelligence, Security & Identity, Network & Tools), header elements (logo, notification bell, theme toggle, user dropdown), navigation buttons, stats strip, and backend APIs.
critical_code_review_comments: Console warning: 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' in Dashboard component - minor issue, should add unique keys to list items
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard modernization complete. Bento grid layout with 4 sections working. User dropdown menu with 7 items working. All navigation buttons tested and working.

header_elements.notarychain_logo: PASS - Logo with Shield icon visible

bento_grid_sections.core_actions: PASS - data-testid='core-actions' with Quick Seal, Request Notarization, Bulk Notarization
bento_grid_sections.ai_intelligence: PASS - data-testid='ai-section' with AI Doc Generator, AI Summarizer, Doc Compare, Doc Remediation
bento_grid_sections.security_identity: PASS - data-testid='security-section' with Video Witness, Biometric Passport, Escrow Intelligence, Fraud Intelligence
bento_grid_sections.network_tools: PASS - data-testid='network-section' with Templates, My Bookings, Find Notaries, Approvals, Reminders, ANAN Network, Branding, Ceremony Mode, Become a Notary

additional_sections.my_notarization_requests: PASS - data-testid='notary-requests' visible with existing requests

backend_tests.get_documents_seals: PASS - Returns array of sealed documents with correct structure

key_findings.bento_layout_working: All 4 bento grid sections render correctly with proper categorization
key_findings.dropdown_menu_working: User dropdown menu opens and shows all 7 menu items (Plan, Security, Privacy, API, Organizations, My Drafts, Logout)
key_findings.navigation_working: All tested navigation buttons correctly route to their target pages
key_findings.stats_strip_working: Stats strip shows Total Seals, Last 30 Days, and Member Since correctly
key_findings.onboarding_tour: OnboardingTour component appears on first load - can be dismissed with 'Skip tour' button
